name: com.caskev.netcode.gameobjects.distributed.authority
description: An extension of Unity's Netcode for GameObjects package that leverages the native ownership system with reliable tracked clients ownership requests, ownership locking options and prediction support.

samples.description: 2D and 3D multiplayer demos using the DistributedNetworkTransform component.
A 3D multiplayer demo using the DistributedNetworkRigidbody component.
A 2D multiplayer demo using the DistributedNetworkRigidbody2D component.
A multiplayer demo using the DistributedNetworkUIComponent component.
